homeFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
homeFaq.subtitle: Quick answers about working with me on web and mobile projects.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: I build websites, web apps, mobile apps, landing pages, and selected AI-assisted product content depending on the project goals.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: I mainly work with React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, Firebase, MySQL, and other modern web tools.

items.question: Do you work with clients remotely?
items.answer: Yes. I work with clients remotely and communicate through email, chat, and video calls throughout the project.

items.question: Can you improve an existing website instead of building a new one?
items.answer: Yes. I can redesign, optimize, fix, or extend an existing site when a full rebuild is not necessary.

items.question: How do we start a project?
items.answer: Send me a message with your idea, goals, and timeline. I will review the scope and reply with the next steps.

invoiceGenerator.faqSubtitle: Quick answers for common questions about using this free online invoice generator.

faqItems.question: Is this invoice generator free to use?
faqItems.answer: Yes. This is a free invoice generator and you can create and download invoices without any subscription.

faqItems.question: Can I use this online invoice generator without sign-up?
faqItems.answer: Yes. No account is required. You can open the tool, fill the fields, and download your invoice PDF instantly.

faqItems.question: Can I add tax and currency before generating the invoice?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can set tax rate, choose currency, and check totals in real time before downloading.

faqItems.question: Does this invoice generator create PDF invoices?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Click Download PDF and your invoice is generated automatically as a PDF file.

faqItems.question: Can I upload my company logo in the invoice?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can upload a company logo and it appears in both preview and PDF output.

faqItems.question: Is my invoice data private?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Invoice editing and generation run in your browser, so your data is not sent to a server by this tool.

imageToWebp.title: Image to WebP Converter
imageToWebp.subtitle: Upload JPG, JPEG, or PNG files, adjust WebP quality, and download the result.
introParagraphs: Use this free Image to WebP converter when you want smaller, web-ready images without leaving the browser. It helps you convert JPG, JPEG, and PNG files to WebP quickly for websites, blogs, landing pages, and online stores.
heroPoints: Convert JPG, JPEG, and PNG to WebP directly in your browser.
Batch-convert multiple images in one session.
Adjust WebP quality to balance file size and image detail.
imageToWebp.relatedBrowseDescription: See the rest of the free converter and utility pages on the site.
imageToWebp.relatedAvifDescription: Need wider compatibility instead? Convert AVIF images into JPG files.
imageToWebp.dropzone: Drag and drop JPG, JPEG, or PNG files here, or click to upload
imageToWebp.qualityHint: Higher quality keeps more detail but gives larger file size.
imageToWebp.emptySubtitle: Upload one or more files to start conversion.
imageToWebp.invalidType: Only JPG, JPEG, and PNG files are supported.
imageToWebp.failedMessage: Could not convert this file. Please try another image.
imageToWebp.faqSubtitle: Quick answers about converting PNG, JPG, and JPEG files to WebP.

faqItems.question: Is this image to WebP converter free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can use this tool for free to convert images and download WebP files.

faqItems.question: What is a WebP file?
faqItems.answer: WebP is a modern image format designed for the web. It often gives smaller file sizes than JPG or PNG while keeping good visual quality.

faqItems.question: Can I convert PNG to WebP?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Upload PNG files and convert them directly to WebP format.

faqItems.question: Can I convert JPG and JPEG to WebP?
faqItems.answer: Yes. JPG and JPEG files are fully supported in this converter.

faqItems.question: Will converting to WebP reduce image size?
faqItems.answer: Usually yes. WebP often gives smaller file size than JPG or PNG, and you can adjust quality to balance size and detail.

faqItems.question: Are my files uploaded to a server?
faqItems.answer: No. Conversion runs in your browser, so files are not uploaded by this tool.

faqItems.question: Can I convert multiple images at once?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can upload multiple files, convert them together, and download them individually or all at once.

imageToWebp.seoSectionTitle: Image to WebP guide and format tips
imageToWebp.seoSectionSubtitle: Learn when WebP is useful, how quality affects file size, and what to expect when converting JPG or PNG images.

seoSections.title: Why convert images to WebP?
seoSections.body: WebP is useful when you want smaller web-ready images for websites, blogs, product pages, and landing pages. Smaller image files can help pages load faster, especially when you are optimizing several assets at once.

seoSections.title: Can WebP reduce image size?
seoSections.body: Often yes. WebP usually compresses images more efficiently than JPG or PNG, although the exact result depends on the source image and the quality setting you choose.

seoSections.title: Converting JPG and PNG to WebP
seoSections.body: JPG, JPEG, and PNG files are all supported in this converter. JPG images often shrink well in WebP format, while PNG images can also benefit, especially when you need better compression for website graphics.

seoSections.title: Adjust quality before you download
seoSections.body: Use the WebP quality slider to balance image detail and file size. Higher quality keeps more detail, while lower quality can reduce weight further for web delivery.

seoHowTo.title: How to convert images to WebP online
seoHowTo.description: Follow these steps to convert JPG, JPEG, and PNG images into WebP files.

steps.title: Upload your images
steps.description: Drag JPG, JPEG, or PNG files into the tool or choose them from your device.

steps.title: Choose the WebP quality
steps.description: Move the quality slider to decide how much detail and compression you want.

steps.title: Convert the files
steps.description: Start the conversion and wait for the WebP previews to finish processing.

steps.title: Download your WebP files
steps.description: Download each converted WebP image individually or save all finished files together.

avifToJpg.title: AVIF to JPG Converter
avifToJpg.subtitle: Upload AVIF files, set JPG quality, choose a background color, and download the result.
introParagraphs: Use this free AVIF to JPG converter when you need wider compatibility for uploads, sharing, websites, or email. AVIF can be efficient, but many tools still work better with JPG, so this page helps you convert the file and download the result in seconds.
heroPoints: Convert AVIF to JPG or JPEG directly in your browser.
Batch-convert multiple AVIF files in one session.
Choose JPG quality and a background color for transparent AVIF images.
avifToJpg.relatedBrowseDescription: See the rest of the free converter and utility pages on the site.
avifToJpg.relatedWebpDescription: Need web optimization instead? Convert JPG, JPEG, and PNG images to WebP.
avifToJpg.dropzone: Drag and drop AVIF files here, or click to upload
avifToJpg.qualityHint: Higher quality keeps more detail but creates larger JPG files.
avifToJpg.backgroundHint: Transparent AVIF areas are flattened onto this background before export.
avifToJpg.transparencyNote: JPG does not support transparency, so transparent pixels are replaced with the selected background color.
avifToJpg.emptySubtitle: Upload one or more AVIF files to start conversion.
avifToJpg.failedMessage: Could not convert this AVIF file. Please try another image or browser.
avifToJpg.faqSubtitle: Quick answers about converting AVIF files to JPG or JPEG online.

faqItems.question: Is this AVIF to JPG converter free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can convert AVIF images to JPG for free and download the results without creating an account.

faqItems.question: Can I convert AVIF to JPEG in this tool?
faqItems.answer: Yes. JPG and JPEG usually refer to the same format, and this tool exports standard JPG image files.

faqItems.question: Are my AVIF files uploaded to a server?
faqItems.answer: No. Conversion runs in your browser, so your AVIF files are not uploaded by this tool.

faqItems.question: Can I convert multiple AVIF files at once?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can upload multiple AVIF files, convert them in one session, and download each JPG file individually or all together.

faqItems.question: What happens to transparency when converting AVIF to JPG?
faqItems.answer: JPG does not support transparency, so transparent areas are flattened onto the background color you choose before export.

faqItems.question: Will the JPG file always be smaller than the AVIF file?
faqItems.answer: Not always. AVIF is often more compressed than JPG, so some converted JPG files may be larger depending on image content and quality settings.

faqItems.question: What is an AVIF file?
faqItems.answer: AVIF is a modern image format known for strong compression and good quality. It can be efficient for the web, but some apps and upload systems still work better with JPG, which is why converting AVIF to JPG is often useful.

avifToJpg.seoSectionTitle: AVIF to JPG guide and format tips
avifToJpg.seoSectionSubtitle: Learn when JPG is the better choice, what AVIF means, and what to expect with transparency and file size.

seoSections.title: When JPG is the safer format for compatibility
seoSections.body: Use this AVIF to JPG converter when you need an image format that works almost everywhere. JPG is still widely supported in older apps, upload forms, CMS tools, messaging platforms, and document tools where AVIF is not always accepted.

seoSections.title: Batch-convert multiple AVIF files in one workflow
seoSections.body: If you have more than one AVIF image to convert, you can add several files, run the conversion once, and download each JPG file individually or all at once. This makes the tool useful for quick batches instead of one-off exports.

seoSections.title: What is an AVIF file?
seoSections.body: AVIF is a newer image format that can compress images very efficiently. The tradeoff is that AVIF is not supported equally in every app or workflow, so converting an AVIF file to JPG is often the easiest way to improve compatibility.

seoSections.title: How transparency works when exporting to JPG
seoSections.body: Choose the JPG quality that fits your use case before exporting. If your AVIF file contains transparent areas, the converter flattens them onto a background color because JPG and JPEG do not support transparency.

seoSections.title: Why can the JPG file be larger than the AVIF file?
seoSections.body: AVIF is often more compressed than JPG, so a converted JPG can sometimes be larger than the original AVIF. If file size matters, lower the JPG quality slightly and compare the output before keeping the final version.

seoHowTo.title: How to convert AVIF to JPG online
seoHowTo.description: Follow these steps to convert AVIF files into JPG images in your browser.

steps.title: Upload your AVIF files
steps.description: Drag AVIF images into the drop area or choose them from your device.

steps.title: Set the JPG quality
steps.description: Move the quality slider to balance image detail and file size for your JPG export.

steps.title: Pick a background color for transparent areas
steps.description: Choose the color that should replace transparency before the AVIF image is saved as JPG.

steps.title: Convert and download your JPG files
steps.description: Start the conversion, review the output previews, and download each JPG file or all of them together.

resumeBuilder.title: Free Resume Builder
resumeBuilder.subtitle: Create a polished, ATS-friendly resume online with live preview, professional resume templates, and instant PDF or DOCX export.
resumeBuilder.localSaveNote: Your draft is saved locally in this browser. No account or database needed.
resumeBuilder.summaryPlaceholder: Write a short summary about your strengths, experience, and the kind of role you are targeting.
resumeBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: Add bullet-style highlights, one per line.
resumeBuilder.educationPlaceholder: Add notable coursework, achievements, or focus areas.
resumeBuilder.skillPlaceholder: Add a skill and press Enter
resumeBuilder.emptySummary: Add a short summary to introduce your profile.
resumeBuilder.emptyContact: Add contact details to show them here.
resumeBuilder.previewRole: Your target role or professional headline
resumeBuilder.pdfError: Unable to generate the PDF right now. Please try again.
resumeBuilder.docxError: Unable to generate the DOCX file right now. Please try again.
resumeBuilder.clearConfirm: Clear your saved resume draft from this browser?
resumeBuilder.faqSubtitle: Quick answers about resume formats, resume templates, ATS tips, and exporting your resume with this free tool.

faqItems.question: Is this resume builder free to use?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can create, edit, and download your resume for free without making an account.

faqItems.question: Can I download my resume as PDF and DOCX?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Export your resume as PDF for ready-to-send applications or DOCX for later editing.

faqItems.question: Does the resume auto-save?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Your draft is saved locally in your browser on the same device, so you can come back and keep editing.

faqItems.question: Is this resume builder private?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The tool works locally in your browser and does not require an account or database to start building your resume.

faqItems.question: Are the templates ATS-friendly?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The templates keep a clean, text-first structure that is easier for ATS software and recruiters to scan.

faqItems.question: What resume format should I use?
faqItems.answer: For most job seekers, a reverse-chronological resume format is the best default because it shows your latest experience first and is widely accepted by recruiters.

faqItems.question: Does this tool include free resume templates?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can switch between resume templates inside the builder and use them for free before downloading PDF or DOCX files.

faqItems.question: Can I use this resume builder if I have little or no experience?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Start with education, projects, skills, certifications, volunteer work, or internships and build a simple one-page resume for your target role.

resumeBuilder.photoHint: Upload a headshot to show it in the preview and exported resume files.
resumeBuilder.photoError: Unable to process this image. Please try another photo file.
resumeBuilder.seoSectionTitle: Resume builder guide, templates, and format tips
resumeBuilder.seoSectionSubtitle: Create a professional resume online, choose the right resume format, and download ready-to-send files in minutes.

seoSections.title: Free resume builder with ATS-friendly resume templates
seoSections.body: Use this free resume builder to create a professional resume online without sign-up. Switch between clean resume templates, edit every section in real time, and download a finished resume in PDF or DOCX format.

seoSections.title: Choose a resume format that works for most jobs
seoSections.body: For most applicants, a reverse-chronological resume format is the safest choice because it highlights recent experience first. This builder keeps the layout clean, readable, and ATS-friendly so your resume format stays easy for recruiters and software to scan.

seoSections.title: Use resume examples and prompts to write faster
seoSections.body: If you are unsure how to write a resume, start with a short headline, strong summary, focused skills list, and achievement-based work history. The live preview makes it easier to shape your content like polished resume examples while you write.

seoSections.title: Download, edit, and reuse your resume
seoSections.body: Export your resume as PDF when you need a ready-to-send file, or choose DOCX if you want to edit it later. Because your draft saves locally in the browser, you can come back and update your resume for every new application.

seoHowTo.title: How to write a resume online
seoHowTo.description: Follow these steps to create a resume quickly with the free resume builder.

steps.title: Choose a resume template
steps.description: Start with the classic or split template and pick the resume format that fits your target role.

steps.title: Add your personal and work details
steps.description: Fill in your contact details, summary, skills, experience, education, and relevant links.

steps.title: Review the live preview
steps.description: Check the wording, spacing, and section order while the preview updates instantly as you type.

steps.title: Download your resume as PDF or DOCX
steps.description: Export a polished resume file for job applications, sharing, or later editing.
